name: Chocolate Syrup Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter and sugar until very creamy and well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, stirring after each addition until well combined.
4. Stir in salt.
5. Mix in flour until the batter is smooth.
6. Fold in chocolate syrup, vanilla, and chopped walnuts until evenly distributed.
7. Grease an 8-inch baking pan with butter or cooking spray and sprinkle with flour.
8. Pour the brownie batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
9. Bake for about 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the brownies to cool completely in the pan before cutting.
11. Cut into squares and garnish with walnut halves on each piece. Dust with confectioners' sugar if desired.
Recipe By: Joel Ehrlich
